subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest my tears and hearest my sighs. I beseech Thee by the splendors of Thy Throne, and the Manifestations of Thy Cause, and the Dawning-Places [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری عبراتی و تسمع زفراتی اسئلک بانوار عرشک و مظاهر امرک و مشارق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @prayer for parents
